nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":"Some tools create their nodes at the center instead of activating the tool. For example, the shape tools should not create a node in the middle, they should behave like the text tool.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":"color: #6b7280;"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":"Same happens for example when linking a board from the palette.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":"color: #6b7280;"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"This is not a bug as much as us being in need for a refactor that lets palette commands enter a \"place on canvas\" mode with a payload (icon, label, etc.) for all commands, text, import, link, shape, etc.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Some tools create their nodes at the center instead of activating the tool. For example, the shape tools should not create a node in the middle, they should behave like the text tool.
Same happens for example when linking a board from the palette.
This is not a bug as much as us being in need for a refactor that lets palette commands enter a "place on canvas" mode with a payload (icon, label, etc.) for all commands, text, import, link, shape, etc.

nodes.plain:
Ink Colors and Eraser
We need a contextual toolbar for the tool itself. The ink tool should activate that toolbar, both in the canvas and in the PDF Viewer.
Options: stroke width and color, optionally pressure sensitivity.

nodes.plain:
Exporting
Different ways of exporting our work.
Exporting Annotated PDFs
Baking the annotations into the PDFs, possibly creating a copy or telling the user this will override their PDFs
Exporting the canvas
As a picture, most likely.

nodes.plain:
PDF page extraction
A command that extracts pages from a PDF, like Microsoft Whiteboard. Should automatically group them in a Set so they're easy to find by the user.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":"Shortcuts aren't exactly working right in the meta palette. The search feature looks good, but what we need is a strict match.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":"color: #6b7280;"},{"children":[],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textStyle":"color: #6b7280;","textFormat":0},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":"If we have ","type":"text","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":1,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":"Arr ","type":"text","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":"and ","type":"text","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":1,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":"rr","type":"text","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":" then if the user types ","type":"text","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":1,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":"rr ","type":"text","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":"because that's an strict match it should only select that one.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":"color: #6b7280;"},{"children":[],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textStyle":"color: #6b7280;","textFormat":0},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"color: #6b7280;","text":"Also all shortcuts should be lowercased and case insensitive during search.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":"color: #6b7280;"}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Shortcuts aren't exactly working right in the meta palette. The search feature looks good, but what we need is a strict match.
If we have Arr and rr then if the user types rr because that's an strict match it should only select that one.
Also all shortcuts should be lowercased and case insensitive during search.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"While the node handles are hidden, you can still drag from them. This is either good or bad, but if we're going to lean on this approach we better make it work better.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"I do kind of like using it now that I realized it works","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
While the node handles are hidden, you can still drag from them. This is either good or bad, but if we're going to lean on this approach we better make it work better.
I do kind of like using it now that I realized it works

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Snuggify text makes it long along one line. We need to only snuggify toward compression. Snuggify can't expand.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"I'm not entirely sure snuggifying on a wrapped node makes any sense though.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"It would be nice to have but it feels really tricky.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Snuggify text makes it long along one line. We need to only snuggify toward compression. Snuggify can't expand.
I'm not entirely sure snuggifying on a wrapped node makes any sense though.
It would be nice to have but it feels really tricky.
